rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §21.506, which governs selection limits for a mentoring program stipend based on state appropriations.
quote: The agency may not select a person to participate in the program unless the agency has sufficient state appropriations to pay the stipend provided by Section 21.509 at the time of the selection.
_note: No textual or substantive conflict between the proposed change and this rule.
